chokri: Pharisee miko mha meho ketako süko metü sekesüce uko pü melüta, (ngomu ta)
english: The Pharisees, who were lovers of money, also heard all these things, and they scoffed at him.

chokri: Süsa zho shorüh sa Jisue Peter mo James, mo sü sazüh-o John züh Pü sa die süko züh kre cejüthu kürükrü pühyo vota.
english: After six days, Jesus took with him Peter, James, and John his brother, and brought them up into a high mountain by themselves.

chokri: I kerhü tsükhrida süozo.
english: I am the bread of life.

chokri: Süzomoli, neko thüriküthi mo thürithi küto dzüh küpo shuh küti se to; sücesü neko lü müyhu müzhe ta mo küto lü zoyite. Kükrenamoli, mha hikohi vori moyi lho zo tina; süri süo thülao mo.
english: You will hear of wars and rumors of wars. See that you aren't troubled, for all this must happen, but the end is not yet.

chokri: Püsükoce po die, ngomümi püh tho hizi küva zo zisü, süce pü cetako pu yisü Süze no hako po vo süko pa küngu va küto n müdo me? zisü.
english: "He said to them, 'An enemy has done this.' "The servants asked him, 'Do you want us to go and gather them up?'

chokri: Süze shedüboo yono küzüve küsü nekoe seyite, pücoko müzü la die; pu nyi nyisa thü pari kütace; nekoe tülü tate zi küti seyiyo.
english: "Now from the fig tree learn this parable. When its branch has now become tender, and puts forth its leaves, you know that the summer is near.

chokri: Eli, Pu uko zü küla die sü, süosü kürikünako mi püh ube püh a züh mükhu pühlü süh kübao zo zita.
english: He answered them, "It is one of the twelve, he who dips with me in the dish.

chokri: U Jihova cechoyo zoküti se bate mu cejü mütüe kürüzhüo khreikhrotayo.
english: We know that we are of God, and the whole world lies in the power of the evil one.

chokri: Eli pükoe thümae zü khaküsü kümütha züko süh mütha die püko rüsu thüdo thi tate; zita.
english: And in vain do they worship me, Teaching as doctrine rules made by men.'"

chokri: Kezho miko po kesü, Mipüri pübide jükepo dile.
english: The officers answered, "No man ever spoke like this man!"

chokri: Hako se keba Jihova Moses ce jüpo, thüma hiola zono hako semo pü dipüce vori sheri.
english: We know that God has spoken to Moses. But as for this man, we don't know where he comes from."

chokri: Kükhrü a züneko, mipo u swüvahite.
english: Don't be deceived, my beloved brothers.

chokri: Süsa Pu hi tozu die lü celü ba küyice khazhonu kükhrüko mo küphomako kükro vori die Jisu mo Pu sadziko züh bayi.
english: It happened as he sat in the house, behold, many tax collectors and sinners came and sat down with Jesus and his disciples.

chokri: Pü ukrü utsüpumi koce reshu pü kemetao Abraham mu shuyeko kecho phra kesü.
english: As he spoke to our fathers, To Abraham and his seed forever."

chokri: M kedepü uko züta, tüyochoyimi pü thüla kedi kece ce kefü-o, Hebrew mizülü püza “Abaddon” veli a Greekmi jülü püza “Apollyon.”
english: They have over them as king the angel of the abyss. His name in Hebrew is "Abaddon," but in Greek, he has the name "Apollyon."

chokri: Uko zapozale Jihova ka m dita (celire) kehoo khi thüma, mera, khonu, m guketa tenhiko marhe thisüyo.
english: and traded the glory of the incorruptible God for the likeness of an image of corruptible man, and of birds, and four-footed animals, and creeping things.

chokri: nepo Nyepoo küvo tüsozho tsühi tali kütsü potolino nepo nelü kühoküro thi mhata moyi Ropüh mhase pü na moyi mi dzüna moyi ha chelü lüsi ngoyi no nüko lü kümüzhe mo küto thi süho.
english: not to be quickly shaken in your mind, nor yet be troubled, either by spirit, or by word, or by letter as from us, saying that the day of Christ had come.

chokri: Uko püfü kela kesü, hako Nazarethmi Jisu phu züle. Jisu ukoce poti, I thüma süo le zisü. Judas pütü kesüo ri süce tha uko züde.
english: They answered him, "Jesus of Nazareth." Jesus said to them, "I AM." Judas also, who betrayed him, was standing with them.

chokri: Neko-e cejüo tsa-o zo; eli mütsa zori pu külhü müdi va lize dipüh püh süo va mülhü layi veta? Süo pu küve pühri di ta die mipo kügü püh zürhüh küdü küva zota to.
english: "You are the salt of the earth, but if the salt has lost its flavor, with what will it be salted? It is then good for nothing, but to be cast out and trodden under the feet of men.

chokri: Reshu keva basa ho; thürü-o kedeba m tekonu sülü ba to; pü choyimiko sülü pü reyibato;
english: There will be no curse any more. The throne of God and of the Lamb will be in it, and his servants serve him.

chokri: Hako ulipü neko ucemi chotha züta ti thiyi su teme, apostle kekreko bi, u sazü jürako neko Niepoo yo baketako bi mu Cephas (neko bi).
english: Have we no right to take along a wife who is a believer, even as the rest of the apostles, and the brothers of the Lord, and Cephas?

chokri: No sopüleno mimejo kebao no Jihova sheco thürayi tole lübame?
english: Do you think this, O man who judges those who practice such things, and do the same, that you will escape the judgment of God?

chokri: Ne Israel miko jü hiko reni yite, Nazarethmi Jisu Jihova medolü nekola zasi, keku, ungo mhatho, neko dolü Jihova püzü thi mu nekori se mu ngo süte.
english: "Men of Israel, hear these words! Jesus of Nazareth, a man approved by God to you by mighty works and wonders and signs which God did by him in the midst of you, even as you yourselves know,

chokri: Tsühi, shu kesüo mu jü chu kesüo uni mipüzo; thüma keho püsheri utho uzhokhro ngo yito, pü dipü bide mhatho thi sheri.
english: Now he who plants and he who waters are the same, but each will receive his own reward according to his own labor.

chokri: I deoba dopülü zho kena (va kena) mevo yo, I zakeri zapü amhazhü metükolü khasüyo.
english: I fast twice a week. I give tithes of all that I get.'

chokri: Sazüjürako Niepo Jisu Khrista ngokemezhe po neko rüpü zü ta keyi thite. Amen.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit, brothers. Amen.

chokri: Jisu püce poti, Philip neko azü pütü kecho vorite, siziri, neko ase mo zola? A ngo kevami Poo sheri ngo vazo, süla dipüla neko Poo khipü hako mhüngo thi süte zibata?
english: Jesus said to him, "Have I been with you such a long time, and do you not know me, Philip? He who has seen me has seen the Father. How do you say, 'Show us the Father?'

chokri: Sidie müreda küti khü püh Pu whü sü, mu tsahu küde pirüh thiyi die püh Pu piyo sü.
english: They clothed him with purple, and weaving a crown of thorns, they put it on him.

chokri: Mhace neko ayo bayi mu ajüko neko lü bayi lize, neko mha nenüko choyite; süko thipü neko tsü süto.
english: If you remain in me, and my words remain in you, you will ask whatever you desire, and it will be done for you.

chokri: Mhaketso kekrekre ba, vele Niepo pü lebi zo.
english: There are various kinds of service, and the same Lord.

chokri: Mu püdzü kha u ceküsü kümha u po Pün u Jisu Khrista zalü mülüyi de hunehu khrüi no küti, süo pü dzü zo.
english: This is his commandment, that we should believe in the name of his Son, Jesus Christ, and love one another, even as he commanded.

chokri: Süsa Jisu puce poti, thümapü mi kekro cüpü pü celü mhati nosü,
english: But he said to him, "A certain man made a great supper, and he invited many people.

chokri: Süpü Paul hani sa mejizo tata, mu sefü poti, thüma hini Therü kerekrü thoo choyimi ho! Uni kelakeyi cho thapü uko meka sü toho.
english: Following Paul and us, she cried out, "These men are servants of the Most High God, who proclaim to us the way of salvation!"

chokri: Mu pukoe ta vo die kükreko ce posü, süri süko ri mülü mota.
english: They went away and told it to the rest. They didn't believe them, either.

chokri: Neko ngokeba nekerhüro thi Kemesa Rüpü jüzü kethilü kethera mozode ne sazüjürako kekhrü, nelü kethothi thelü kemesalü hunehu khrü keba.
english: Seeing you have purified your souls in your obedience to the truth through the Spirit in sincere brotherly affection, love one another from the heart fervently:

chokri: Uko pü Hebrew jülü po ketala uko kemekre zü zikuta.
english: When they heard that he spoke to them in the Hebrew language, they were even more quiet. He said,

chokri: Pü süpo kesüce Sadduceeko mu Phariseeko dolü kelakre sürita, side makro keza kena thita.
english: When he had said this, an argument arose between the Pharisees and Sadducees, and the assembly was divided.

chokri: I Thadzü nüko zü küba che mha sükosü pü nüko che poküsü nüko seyi mota me?
english: Don't you remember that, when I was still with you, I told you these things?

chokri: Sücesü ceta pu besüh süo tüprü pu phelü züyi die puce sho die sü, a phimüzhe die tsühilute, I ri npo thi nprü tole zisü.
english: "So his fellow servant fell down at his feet and begged him, saying, 'Have patience with me, and I will repay you!'

chokri: Thelü rede keyi mu kejo vakesü Jerusalem lü poshüdü de shuye metülü püza pü posü ketola.
english: and that repentance and remission of sins should be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning at Jerusalem.

chokri: Mhaceno nbe nthi müsü lize, süo dathü vate; kükrelamori, lalhe die kürhüthilü lü kütae nbe künanyi ba die tasü mezalü me mhapüceri mhü tayi külho;
english: If your hand causes you to stumble, cut it off. It is better for you to enter into life maimed, rather than having your two hands to go into Gehenna, into the unquenchable fire,

chokri: Nekoyo zhokhro kha kesübi püzhokhro kha pü tsü süte, pü mhathoko zhokhro zakene kha pütsü süte, pü he sü chu kesüko zakena süpü pü tsüte.
english: Return to her just as she returned, and repay her double as she did, and according to her works. In the cup which she mixed, mix to her double.

chokri: Kekrelamori mhace Joshua kerelü pü uko tsüsü lize, süsa pü tüsozho kekrepü posü moto me.
english: For if Joshua had given them rest, he would not have spoken afterward of another day.

chokri: Süo kengo kemere thi ketola Moses sheri poti, “I mpe ri zote mu reshü renaritazo.”
english: and so fearful was the appearance, that Moses said, "I am terrified and trembling."

chokri: Süla uko pfü kenguyi, uko tisho chütsükhri kengupü merha kerikenalü chuyi,
english: So they gathered them up, and filled twelve baskets with broken pieces from the five barley loaves, which were left over by those who had eaten.

chokri: Vele mha sükola I thipü tsüsa va mozo, mori a kerhüro hihi lüpü ala mhapüri zomo, side I yitholü amesüco anüde thivo tsosü ketola, yitho hio I Niepoo Jisu celü ngoyi, sülü Jihova ngokemezhe jüyikeve po mese sü ketola.
english: But these things don't count; nor do I hold my life dear to myself, so that I may finish my race with joy, and the ministry which I received from the Lord Jesus, to fully testify to the Gospel of the grace of God.

chokri: Kekrelamori khapü kemeta jüo, I pütü hice vorito; m Sara thepu nupü ngoyito.
english: For this is a word of promise, "At the appointed time I will come, and Sarah will have a son."

chokri: I nieko lü thi müshü la mo kütola nieko cie vo mo küto müdoyi te
english: But I determined this for myself, that I would not come to you again in sorrow.

chokri: Süri I rhülasü küta sa neko züra tasü Galileelü vo tato;
english: However, after I am raised up, I will go before you into Galilee."

chokri: Ha nyotata ri süo Nyepoo la zo, mücie bari süo nieko la zo.
english: For if we are beside ourselves, it is for God. Or if we are of sober mind, it is for you.

chokri: Pü jü hiko po kevasa Galilee lü basata.
english: Having said these things to them, he stayed in Galilee.

chokri: Süsü bi Jihova sheri pü medolü kalü khasütsü keto pü mharhü rederele kemo reshu pü thi kemetü süzo.
english: In this way God, being determined to show more abundantly to the heirs of the promise the immutability of his counsel, interposed with an oath;

chokri: Süze thüma kühopühri n kümu thi die n züh maldo püh vo to ta lize, pu züh maldo küna ri vovate.
english: Whoever compels you to go one mile, go with him two.

chokri: Miceta-o, poti, kezhoo n kepoko thitso süte, siri thethi kekro meshopü balu,
english: "The servant said, 'Lord, it is done as you commanded, and there is still room.'

chokri: Uko metü tiyi, de meguyi, süsalü tishoko kengupü merha kerikena chuyi.
english: They ate, and were all filled. They gathered up twelve baskets of broken pieces that were left over.

chokri: Thefüpü ace kepo se, Peter tasüte, de khonuko dokhri pü tite.
english: I also heard a voice saying to me, 'Rise, Peter, kill and eat!'

chokri: Yhie; azu mu a sazühzürako sü; thüma kühopühri Jihova müdoko thiyo kütio sü a sazüh-o, mu alipü, mu azu zo, zita.
english: For whoever does the will of God, the same is my brother, and my sister, and mother."

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, sadzühküsemi kükro ri mo kümathomi kükro ri neko küngoko hi ngo nyi shüh vori, eli süko ngoyi mote, mo puko neko rünyi kütiko rünyi nyi vori eli puko süko rünyiyi mote.
english: For most assuredly I tell you that many prophets and righteous men desired to see the things which you see, and didn't see them; and to hear the things which you hear, and didn't hear them.

chokri: Pü mesoyo kiri ketio metüko pi, pü cejülü vori lize cejü zo, cejülü jüko poyo, tüyo kevori yosü metüko pi.
english: He who comes from above is above all. He who is from the Earth belongs to the Earth, and speaks of the Earth. He who comes from heaven is above all.

chokri: Süla thüma kühopühri utho u mükhre kümüsa püh thürho pü kümoko thürüyi loo pü thipüh thürho küpü müsa küta Nepoo po süh mhathiyi küshü mhatho küve mütüko la küla kreküyi mhabü püh thiyi to.
english: If anyone therefore purges himself from these, he will be a vessel for honor, sanctified, and suitable for the master's use, prepared for every good work.

chokri: Sidie Pu yisü, No tüprü a rüsu to lize I hiko mütü püh n prüto, zita.
english: He said to him, "I will give you all of these things, if you will fall down and worship me."

chokri: Sücesü tükhra khrade püh vori die dpüzuo hüta, sidie dzü rüphü lüri süo chuyi ta züta.
english: There arose a great wind storm, and the waves beat into the boat, so much that the boat was already filled.

chokri: Pü poti mhako thüma thiyi kehoko, Jihova thi yi ve.
english: But he said, "The things which are impossible with men are possible with God."

chokri: Sücesü Pilate Pu yisü, puko n kümütsu zü di thüdüpüh po ba sheli no se ba mo me? zisü.
english: Then Pilate said to him, "Don't you hear how many things they testify against you?"

chokri: Uko sekemomi sa meji yomo, vele pücelü tatayo, uko sekemo miko fü semo ketala.
english: They will by no means follow a stranger, but will flee from him; for they don't know the voice of strangers."

chokri: Pütho phe mopüra püsü, mu kesao pü ketako thakemekre bata, pü poti, “kresa-o, I ncepoyo, tasürite.”
english: He came near and touched the coffin, and the bearers stood still. He said, "Young man, I tell you, arise!"

chokri: Mu pu süri moli zita, mu putü husa süce küthakoe Peter yisü, nori puko zo küthozo noe Galileemi mu n züpo lün seyi te, zita.
english: But he again denied it. After a little while again those who stood by said to Peter, "You truly are one of them, for you are a Galilean, and your speech shows it."

chokri: Süsa Jisu pu yisü; no mülüyi lize mülüküyimi la mha mütü thiyi ve zo, zisü.
english: Jesus said to him, "If you can believe, all things are possible to him who believes."

chokri: Süsa I dipü po bata? Therü marhe sü mhapü zome? Mori reshü thipü therü marhe ce kesü mhapü zome?
english: What am I saying then? That a thing sacrificed to idols is anything, or that an idol is anything?

chokri: Mhakehopülü sheri kethezü khasü zote, nekola hiohi Jisu Khrista la Jihova medo tazo.
english: In everything give thanks, for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus toward you.

chokri: Pü revü Damascus kemenoce vori, rekri tüyo kevepü tatsü pükhü metü va vekrüta;
english: As he traveled, it happened that he got close to Damascus, and suddenly a light from the sky shone around him.

chokri: Süsa unyi unyi po mo püzu-o khamha va die Pu sa müdzita.
english: They immediately left the boat and their father, and followed him.

chokri: Süla ha ce hio lü bari mori Pü nü thiyi ton thühe thiyo.
english: Therefore also we make it our aim, whether at home or absent, to be well pleasing to him.

chokri: Niepoo be uko züta, thüma kekro melüyi de Niepoo ce vorita.
english: The hand of the Lord was with them, and a great number believed and turned to the Lord.

chokri: Süko cie-i kükrelamoli pühnieko Kain cholü vo mu zhokhro ngoi kütana tashü Balaam kükriküta dzü shie-i zei mu Korah nuko punieko mhuküzhomi dzü zimo küsülü katsota.
english: Woe to them! For they went in the way of Cain, and ran riotously in the error of Balaam for hire, and perished in Korah's rebellion.

chokri: Püpo jüpoyi keve thisü, metha Paul pheniejulü thayi de thümakopo kemekrede püfü reniyi no pübe chopü uko kekhasü. Süsa thümako kemekre züzi bata, pü Hebrew mi meyilü jü posü.
english: When he had given him permission, Paul, standing on the stairs, beckoned with his hand to the people. When there was a great silence, he spoke to them in the Hebrew language, saying,

chokri: I neko ketsüpü rüyi nosü neko sosü kemora, kekremi mhatho kethi lü neko ta mhatho sülü lüzü.
english: I sent you to reap that for which you haven't labored. Others have labored, and you have entered into their labor."

chokri: Uko pitha thenomi pitha bi, uko huko Losha huko bi
english: They had hair like women's hair, and their teeth were like those of lions.

chokri: No dibi zuta?
english: How did you sleep?

chokri: Süri, I nekoce po süto, thüma kühopühri kürügükürüzü na zo kümo sa pu cemi khava lize pu püh kürügükürüzülü süva zo; mo kühopühri pu khaküva pü yi lize pu ri kürüzü thi tazo.
english: but I tell you that whoever puts away his wife, except for the cause of sexual immorality, makes her an adulteress; and whoever marries her when she is put away commits adultery.

chokri: Pü hüpi hizi kebathe, süce mhakha kesüko, mu rütho thi kesüko kenani, yitho kethilü pü thipü vetsü vetso mesaketa thisü mozo, ulü kelü umedoko laco.
english: which is a symbol of the present age, where gifts and sacrifices are offered that are incapable, concerning the conscience, of making the worshipper perfect;

chokri: Kekrelamori pütüpü nce vorito, n ngomuko tekhü chüpü n hu püyito, de nbo yito, mu pükhüko metülü n-hu püyito.
english: For the days will come on you, when your enemies will throw up a barricade against you, surround you, hem you in on every side,

chokri: Kelakeyi mhase khapü püthümako tsü süto, uko kejo kemu va keyi.
english: To give knowledge of salvation to his people by the remission of their sins,

chokri: Mipühne mhathi ba me? Pü po kühulü pethimi cüyi de uko po pü la chosüte mu Nepoo zalü tsühdzü püh künhüsüyi,
english: Is any among you sick? Let him call for the elders of the assembly, and let them pray over him, anointing him with oil in the name of the Lord,

chokri: Vele künemi po ri pü thi kürünu küsüce unüyite, kükrelamole pü ri nhabi de ratazoto kütsü la.
english: and the rich, in that he is made humble, because like the flower in the grass, he will pass away.

chokri: Uko pütüpü tavo kezüce Cyren mipü Simon pürünalü tavori züde pütüyi, de püpo cross pü Jisu sameji vo.
english: When they led him away, they grabbed one Simon of Cyrene, coming from the country, and laid on him the cross, to carry it after Jesus.

chokri: Simon Peter poti, Niepoo aphe lebi mori, abe mu api sheri khrü vate.
english: Simon Peter said to him, "Lord, not my feet only, but also my hands and my head!"

chokri: Hijü thopü metatiko ukopo seyi ketola thopü meta, uko sügüsühe m hunehu thi kethepu de ketholesiyo ukemeri ba ketola.
english: For whatever things were written before were written for our learning, that through patience and through encouragement of the Scriptures we might have hope.

chokri: Nejo püco vü (kekhu) sülize, kekreco kerüpü tsüsa süte; n bola pükhiyi talize nbola (meso-o) ri pü putsü sa süte.
english: To him who strikes you on the cheek, offer also the other; and from him who takes away your cloak, don't withhold your coat also.

chokri: Süri puko süo lü kürübro die utho u sholulü vota, mipü putho pu yilü prüta, kükremi püh pu lhetho sholü vota.
english: But they made light of it, and went their ways, one to his own farm, another to his merchandise,

chokri: A kepo neko la thenga. Neko dolü mhakese mipüri di teme? Mote, neko sazü jüra dolü sheco kethi bamozo teme?
english: I say this to move you to shame. Isn't there even one wise man among you who would be able to decide between his brothers?

chokri: Uko mhüceo ketso sala de poti, no dipüle pü lüba, nmhü thipü mhango kesüo? Pü po kesü, pü saju kepo mipü zo.
english: Therefore they asked the blind man again, "What do you say about him, because he opened your eyes?" He said, "He is a prophet."

chokri: Si kütsüo mole ha kümükhrü kümüvako khave, küdove tsü cholü mo, mori kücejü lü Niepoo dzüko khimo vele küthoo zhopo thi mu mipo sülü ha lüdo ri sheyi küve thi tayo.
english: But we have renounced the hidden things of shame, not walking in craftiness, nor handling the word of God deceitfully; but by the manifestation of the truth commending ourselves to every man's conscience in the sight of God.

chokri: Süsa püko Jerusalem müno vori küzüce tasü Olive cejüthu co Bethphage lü voriyi; mo Jisu müthaküyi mi küna kütsüh sü die;
english: When they drew near to Jerusalem, and came to Bethsphage, to the Mount of Olives, then Jesus sent two disciples,

chokri: Cebü mesolü thethi kemethipü thapü neni ka süto, ketsopü kemetapü, sülü ukola mhakerede yite.”
english: He will show you a large, furnished upper room. Make preparations there."

chokri: Pü sajiko püce poti, Jews miko ketsüpü nva toli ba tila, Kemethao, no sülü sala kho tola?
english: The disciples told him, "Rabbi, the Jews were just trying to stone you, and are you going there again?"

chokri: Süko natsimiko dukalü bade, hunehu cü de poti, hako leli khusü neko mese, nekonasü mote; hako thekri thisü vele neko krasü mote.
english: They are like children who sit in the marketplace, and call one to another, saying, 'We piped to you, and you didn't dance. We mourned, and you didn't weep.'

chokri: Süla ha tsü mipühri thümoo ceco she tamote, ha thadzü Khrista ri thümoo ceco she vele tsüno sübi mote.
english: Therefore we know no one after the flesh from now on. Even though we have known Christ after the flesh, yet now we know him so no more.

chokri: Pü poti, I anatsilü süko thi mu zü vorite.
english: He said, "I have observed all these things from my youth up."

chokri: Pü mhahiko kepoo pode, I vorizo ketho to mhai de, Amen, sizizoto, vorite, Niepo Jisu.
english: He who testifies these things says, "Yes, I come quickly." Amen! Yes, come, Lord Jesus.

chokri: Hihi süh mhatho küthio nu zo mo me? Püzu ri Mary zo mo me? Süze pü sazühneko James mo Joseph mo Simon mo Judah hiko mo me?
english: Isn't this the carpenter's son? Isn't his mother called Mary, and his brothers, James, Joses, Simon, and Judas?

chokri: Uko takre pra ketasa, ukotho kerethisü, Thüma hio sa keshü, mori thejüthi püphapü meta zü mozo.
english: When they had withdrawn, they spoke one to another, saying, "This man does nothing worthy of death or of bonds."

chokri: Pütühu sülü ba, süsa ta Galatia mu Phrygia rünako lü vo, side kemelü miko thi kethepu shusü.
english: Having spent some time there, he departed, and went through the region of Galatia, and Phrygia, in order, establishing all the disciples.

chokri: Sidie püko Jisu zü küla die sü, Hako poyilho, zita. Süsa Pu süko yisü I ri dipüh küku süh die mha hikohi thiyo sheli küti nekoce poyilho, zita.
english: They answered Jesus, and said, "We don't know." He also said to them, "Neither will I tell you by what authority I do these things.

chokri: Sizisü mu metha cece süshu vorita, thejüce mejuko metü kena shuta; mu thejüce cekhako khri yita, thejü miko phekhako rezüta.
english: Suddenly there was a great earthquake, so that the foundations of the prison were shaken; and immediately all the doors were opened, and everyone's bonds were loosened.

chokri: No Messiah lize hakoce posüte; pü kela kesü, mhace I neko ce posü zori neko melüyi ho.
english: "If you are the Christ, tell us." But he said to them, "If I tell you, you won't believe,

chokri: Uhükeba sheri Niepoo la hübayo, usata sheri Niepoo la sa tayo; süla urhüba sheri mori sata to sheri Niepoo zhüzo.
english: For if we live, we live to the Lord. Or if we die, we die to the Lord. If therefore we live or die, we are the Lord's.

chokri: Pu kütsola die, dipüh-o ta? zisü. Jisu po la die; No mi dokhri sü, no rügü rüzü sü no mi rügo sü, no kücezü zhopo thi sü,
english: He said to him, "Which ones?" Jesus said, "'You shall not murder.' 'You shall not commit adultery.' 'You shall not steal.' 'You shall not offer false testimony.'

chokri: Pethi-o no khapüh küdaküyi thünopü mu pü mu neko ce I küthoo lü nieko khrüyo mu alübi mo. Siri küthoo sheyo küzho mütü risa.
english: The elder, to the chosen lady and her children, whom I love in truth; and not I only, but also all those who know the truth;

chokri: Süla no tüzülü pokesüko cetuyo po mese metosüto.
english: Therefore whatever you have said in the darkness will be heard in the light. What you have spoken in the ear in the inner chambers will be proclaimed on the housetops.

chokri: Mha bashu metükolü, theralü Jihova talü kepopü Judahmi melüsü.
english: Much in every way! Because first of all, they were entrusted with the oracles of God.

chokri: Sidie Pu Nazareth khava die tasü Zebulun mo Naphtali nyi taralü dzüküzho shice Kapernaumlü vo lhü bata.
english: Leaving Nazareth, he came and lived in Capernaum, which is by the sea, in the region of Zebulun and Naphtali,

chokri: Mi mejo hite, size mi neko mejo taho; milümesu hite silize mi nelü mesuho; mikejo va mitsüte, silize nekejo va süto.
english: Don't judge, And you won't be judged. Don't condemn, And you won't be condemned. Set free, And you will be set free.

chokri: Süzi kemelümiko Paul mu Silas ni ketsüpü Beroea lü süva, uni sülü vokeyice ta Jews mi synagogue lülü.
english: The brothers immediately sent Paul and Silas away by night to Beroea. When they arrived, they went into the Jewish synagogue.

chokri: I Euodia mu Syntyche ni po Niepoo yolü lüpü thiyi no rüda yo.
english: I exhort Euodia, and I exhort Syntyche, to think the same way in the Lord.

chokri: Vele akelüce mecho bamode nekozü kengo tato, mu uko kezüngo de mha kepo tato, kezükeve (krokrü) tipo neko züba keyi thite, uzüko neko kelü süho, ukhrethomiko zacü zode kelü süte.
english: but I hope to see you soon, and we will speak face to face. Peace be to you. The friends greet you. Greet the friends by name.

chokri: Kekrelamori saju kepo thajütho thüma celü kevorijü, thüma medo lümo; vele thüma kemesa Jihova celü kevoriko posü, Kemesa Rüpü ukoyo melü kesülü.
english: For no prophecy ever came by the will of man: but holy men of God spoke, being moved by the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Vele tsühi Timothy neko celü ta hico vori tolize side neko kemelü kevaphiti kekhrü theju keve püvori tisa, side neko ha rekra sü keba pükeve hako zü kesü nyüsa sü keba, hako sheri neko zü de kesünyü kebabi.
english: But when Timothy came just now to us from you, and brought us glad news of your faith and love, and that you have good memories of us always, longing to see us, even as we also long to see you;

chokri: Paul apostle mipü, thüma celü mo, vele Jisu Khrista mu Poo Jihova celü, püthi merhü kesüo.
english: Paul, an apostle (not from men, neither through man, but through Jesus Christ, and God the Father, who raised him from the dead),

chokri: Vele hako kefüo Paul fü kereniceri ruketho kezhoo, mu ru niepoo fü reni kuta.
english: But the centurion gave more heed to the master and to the owner of the ship than to those things which were spoken by Paul.

chokri: Süsa püzu mu püsazüko ta püce vori, vele uko talü püzü kesüyi hota, kekrelamori thümako kefüphi ketala,
english: His mother and brothers came to him, and they could not come near him for the crowd.

chokri: Pü cejü zada zapü lü vode shuyeko kedo to, Gog & Magog (Russia & Aermong) de uko züvo kengu süde theri thi keto la; phri phai kho thito, tüsünyo bi.
english: and he will come out to deceive the nations which are in the four corners of the earth, Gog and Magog, to gather them together to the war; the number of whom is as the sand of the sea.

chokri: Kekrelamori kephoma thezho khakesüo khipü akedova de adokhri va.
english: for sin, finding occasion through the commandment, deceived me, and through it killed me.

chokri: Kemerilü rechü bazote, kemezhe zori sügüsühe bazoyi; kecho thimetü vahi.
english: rejoicing in hope; enduring in troubles; continuing steadfastly in prayer;

chokri: vele I Pen (lesi kethosü) mu Ink (püjü) lü thopü neko ce sümo tato.
english: I had many things to write to you, but I am unwilling to write to you with ink and pen;

chokri: Kekrelamori Moses thezho khapü utsü, vele ngokemezhe mu kejütho Jisu Khrista celü vori.
english: For the law was given through Moses. Grace and truth came through Jesus Christ.

chokri: Süpi sheri semeku keyi kekrelamori thevo kekrepü Melchizedec zhorele biti tapra ri keto popü meta.
english: This is yet more abundantly evident, if after the likeness of Melchizedek there arises another priest,

chokri: Adam la kesa vori, metüyo sübi Khrista lano kesalü rhüla keyi thümayo vorite.
english: For as in Adam all die, so also in Christ all will be made alive.

chokri: Kemelü lü Abel rütho khakesü Cain reshü ce vekuti thipü Jihova tsü, süola pü zhopo thüma kemezi ngoyi, Jihova püzho posü te; süla pü sata zori püju urethi tazo.
english: By faith, Abel offered to God a more excellent sacrifice than Cain, through which he had testimony given to him that he was righteous, God bearing witness with respect to his gifts; and through it he, being dead, still speaks.

chokri: Süsa pu sholü ta vo küzüce mipüh ta puce vori pumhüzülü shetüyi die sü; kümütha keveo, küshothe kürhüh püh azü thiyi küto la I dipüh thi mosüa? zita.
english: As he was going out into the way, one ran to him, knelt before him, and asked him, "Good Teacher, what shall I do that I may inherit eternal life?"

chokri: Kükrenamoli Ropü se-e mha mütü lü uzhove, matho mu kütho poyotsüna.
english: for the fruit of the Spirit is in all goodness and righteousness and truth,

chokri: Simode thüma kühopuri puthon pu celümi kükhayi semolize puno dipübide u Kümünupüh kühu küsü münuyi veta?
english: (but if a man doesn't know how to rule his own house, how will he take care of the assembly of God?)

chokri: Mhace atho azhopo thiyo lize azhopo kethomo.
english: "If I testify about myself, my witness is not valid.

chokri: Mhace kesami rhüla kesüdi ze süsa Khrista rhüla sü mote.
english: For if the dead aren't raised, neither has Christ been raised.

chokri: Ne suna mu rükathiko mhotshü züte. Mhotshü küzü süo ne mütsü küzü zhopo zo mu me kümha ne thi tiyi tato. Ne thülaco la cene künguyite.
english: Your gold and your silver are corroded, and their corrosion will be for a testimony against you, and will eat your flesh like fire. You have laid up your treasure in the last days.

chokri: Jewmiko a shuyelü anani kütso meveyi, azü ketü kethedü tiko dülü ukopi thisü; aponeko zho relekolü alü keni mezüri ta ketala.
english: I advanced in the Jews' religion beyond many of my own age among my countrymen, being more exceedingly zealous for the traditions of my fathers.

chokri: Kükrelamole hano küngoko whuzü mo vele ngokümoko whuzüe: küngoko sü pütü dopüh lazo vele ngokümoko küchothe zhü.
english: while we don't look at the things which are seen, but at the things which are not seen. For the things which are seen are temporal, but the things which are not seen are eternal.

chokri: Kümüda, midzü rünyi yo kümo, kümüko küzü Ukümünupü kükhrü ceri utho unü unyü thinyü küzümi süto,
english: traitors, headstrong, conceited, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God;

chokri: Ngokemezhelü mhaphrü kekre keti kha uko tsüsü, saju kepo sheri ukemelü didüpü ba sheri südü poyi khe.
english: Having gifts differing according to the grace that was given to us, if prophecy, let us prophesy according to the proportion of our faith;

chokri: Kekrelamori thajü zori Moses ju phripü nade metülü sütazo, deoba nha synagogue kolü.
english: For Moses from generations of old has in every city those who preach him, being read in the synagogues every Sabbath."

chokri: Vele Jisu Khrista khi bemene yite, uthi upho nüthi ketola mhapüri thihi; sükola kemenyüko lü bahi.
english: But put on the Lord Jesus Christ, and make no provision for the flesh, for its lusts.

chokri: Süsa puko müprüh shuta die sü huhu yisü; Hiohi dibi ti mapüh ta? Tükhra mu dzüde thori Pu khü züh küta hi? Zita.
english: They were greatly afraid, and said to one another, "Who then is this, that even the wind and the sea obey him?"

chokri: “I nekola anü tipü ba, I süce ba kemola; nekopo melü yive ketola: kehothi sheri uko ta püce vo khe.”
english: I am glad for your sakes that I was not there, so that you may believe. Nevertheless, let's go to him."

chokri: Muhakorei dzü hiko thopü neko ce süyo, nekünüyo po tsüyiküto la Jihova Küve-o zo.
english: And we write these things to you, that our joy may be fulfilled.

chokri: A kelüce mha hiko tsü kehülü kemezhe keba tülü la vezoto, A kepo thüma püla keve sülü bayi te.
english: I think that it is good therefore, because of the distress that is on us, that it is good for a man to be as he is.

chokri: Süsalü ukromiko (sazüjürako) thüma kra püngu kezü sheri vapülü mengosü, kekrolaco tsüdo sheri rhü balu vele humi sate.
english: Then he appeared to over five hundred brothers at once, most of whom remain until now, but some have also fallen asleep.

chokri: Sidie puko Pu dokhri vato, süri Pü zhosüh nha rhühlasü tato, zita. Süna püko mütü ulü sü shüh ta
english: and they will kill him, and the third day he will be raised up." They were exceedingly sorry.

chokri: Pü süo ngokeyice pü pübokayo süyi rechü tavorito.
english: When he has found it, he carries it on his shoulders, rejoicing.

chokri: Süsa thelao vorito, pü Jihova kede rüvü phu mesü kesüce, uko Poo, pü thezho mikekhapü ketako, keku mu kemeco metü nüda kevasa;
english: Then the end comes, when he will deliver up the Kingdom to God, even the Father; when he will have abolished all rule and all authority and power.

chokri: Sürite, die uko tazü ta khe, Yhie a tüsü küto-oe vori bate, zita.
english: Arise, let's be going. Behold, he who betrays me is at hand."

chokri: Neko mipü dahu fü keto rhüyi, ba merayi de püma sosü, Thitsoyi tome ho shi?
english: For which of you, desiring to build a tower, doesn't first sit down and count the cost, to see if he has enough to complete it?

chokri: Paul la sheri, mori Apollo la sheri, mori Cephas la sheri, mori cejüo la sheri, mori kerhümi la sheri, mori kesa la sheri, mori tsüdo mha kebako la sheri, mori hisa vori keto mhako la sheri, mhapüri mozo, vele püla zo.
english: whether Paul, or Apollos, or Cephas, or the world, or life, or death, or things present, or things to come. All are yours,

chokri: Khonu kengo süo tekho khorhü bi, püphe zi ni thega phezibi, püta Losha ta bi; fükera po ketsü kha pü tsü, pubari mu pü kemeco ri
english: The beast which I saw was like a leopard, and his feet were like those of a bear, and his mouth like the mouth of a lion. The dragon gave him his power, his throne, and great authority.

chokri: Sidie puko püzu pühyo no tasü mi ta kümora vota.
english: They went away in the boat to a desert place by themselves.

chokri: Süsa pukoe Pupo uko rünalüno tata no die uko müzhe mülo ta.
english: They began to beg him to depart from their region.

chokri: Thüma kehopüri kerhü lesida lü uza ngoyi kemokhü kehüpü mezalü süva.
english: If anyone was not found written in the book of life, he was cast into the lake of fire.

chokri: Süsa tüyo Niepoo choyimi pü pü mhüngo, thisüta kethü reshü khü uzaco.
english: An angel of the Lord appeared to him, standing on the right side of the altar of incense.

chokri: Hako pü valayi ho ketace poti, Niepoo medo thi yite.
english: When he would not be persuaded, we ceased, saying, "The Lord's will be done."

chokri: Süsa Jisu Synagoguelü lalü, mu sülü besa kütami pühba.
english: He entered again into the synagogue, and there was a man there who had his hand withered.

chokri: Khü mu la ba zoyite, zi küsü hi nekoce ri mu kükreko ce ri mütü po süho.
english: What I tell you, I tell all: Watch."

chokri: Kedipü bide püsa phri yita? Püyi kerüce me? Püyi rükemolü ta? Püyi kerülü mo vele yirükemolü.
english: How then was it counted? When he was in circumcision, or in uncircumcision? Not in circumcision, but in uncircumcision.

chokri: Tsüyovi mipü pori akebü hite, ayo athiapho yo thekuko ta Niepoo Jisu la.
english: From now on, let no one cause me any trouble, for I bear the marks of the Lord Jesus branded on my body.

chokri: Sübi die küna ngo küyio ri vo südü küna mveyi.
english: In like manner he also who got the two gained another two.

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, cejülü züyiküve hio püh zhopoh thi sü küto mütülü thüno hipü mhathi küsü hi kürükra ri sapo zoto, zita.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, wherever this Gospel may be preached throughout the whole world, that which this woman has done will also be spoken of for a memorial of her."

chokri: Süce Peter Jisu zü küla die sü, Nyepoo uko hicehi ba küta uko na vezo tole; No n müdo lize uko hicehi pro süh thiyi to khe, pühnha, püh Moses na, mo püh Elijah na; zita.
english: Peter answered, and said to Jesus, "Lord, it is good for us to be here. If you want, let's make three tents here: one for you, one for Moses, and one for Elijah."

chokri: Mu Jisue sü, Izo! Mu nekoe Thümanuoe kükuthoo zaco ba die tüyo kümhülu lün vori küzü ngoto; zita.
english: Jesus said, "I AM. You will see the Son of Man sitting at the right hand of Power, and coming with the clouds of the sky."

chokri: Mhakühopühri utalü külü khü u vadelü ki die khapüh covüthilü kügü vayo küti neko se mo zo me?
english: Don't you understand that whatever goes into the mouth passes into the belly, and then out of the body?

chokri: Mu uko metü rüpülü jükra, rüpülü tsüro uko sameji ketao yo jükra, süo Khrista tsüro.
english: and all drank the same spiritual drink. For they drank of a spiritual rock that followed them, and the rock was Christ.

chokri: Sidie pu ceta besüh kükreko vü mo küthi shühdü tato; mo kümüzühmiko züh die ti mo kra müzüh bato;
english: and begins to beat his fellow-servants, and eat and drink with the drunken,

chokri: I melütü keba, nekoce kevorice Khrista Jüyikeve thejo khapü neko tsü thishuthi süto.
english: I know that, when I come to you, I will come in the fullness of the blessing of the Gospel of Christ.

chokri: Siyi yo nie cejü hio lü müzikümo mu u lü kürüzho kütako dolü mesa mu mejokühomi thi Kemenupü nunie thi bayito.
english: that you may become blameless and harmless, children of God without blemish in the midst of a crooked and perverse generation, among whom you are seen as lights in the world,

chokri: Uko pü zülüsü keto chophu medita, kekrelamori thümakrori ketala, uko cetuyo kuta, cetu cepha sü püzilü pü püki Jisu mhüjülü süsü.
english: Not finding a way to bring him in because of the multitude, they went up to the housetop, and let him down through the tiles with his cot into the midst before Jesus.

chokri: John zhopo kha kesü, I tülü Kemesa Rüpü kiri kezü mekhropü bi mu taki püyo ba yita.
english: John testified, saying, "I have seen the Spirit descending like a dove out of heaven, and it remained on him.

chokri: Süsa humi Puce, Yhei nzu mo n sazüh neko n züh kürüthi nyi die vori ceta tha ho; zisü.
english: One said to him, "Behold, your mother and your brothers stand outside, seeking to speak to you."

chokri: I nekoce po süto, thüma kühopühri kürügü kürüzü na zo kümosa pu cemi kha va die thüno kükre yi lize pu rügü rüzü ta zo; thüma kühopühri pu kha küvapü yi lize pu ri rügü rüzü tazo, zita.
english: I tell you that whoever divorces his wife, except for sexual immorality, and marries another, commits adultery; and he who marries her when she is divorced commits adultery."

chokri: Kekrelamori Sadduceeko kelü kesami rhüla kesü bamo, mori tüyo choyimi sheri, mori rüpü zo sheri, vele Phariseeko süko melüyo.
english: For the Sadducees say that there is no resurrection, nor angel, nor spirit; but the Pharisees confess all of these.

chokri: Mo Pu püko khüküla diesü, Mipüh pu be pühlü azüh mükhu pühlü süh küsüo tsü tho atü püh mi belü süto, zita.
english: He answered, "He who dipped his hand with me in the dish, the same will betray me.

chokri: Uko metü ungota side seyisu ketala uko poti hihi kedipü cota?
english: They were all amazed, and were perplexed, saying one to another, "What does this mean?"

chokri: I Niepoo yo a nü shu bate, nieko a rüle rükra la küsüla, nieko a rüle müdo bazo vele süo thisü küto tü ngoyi mo vote.
english: But I rejoice in the Lord greatly, that now at length you have revived your thought for me; in which you did indeed take thought, but you lacked opportunity.

chokri: Sazüjürako, thüma kehopüri pücüyi ketako Jihova yo thayi te.
english: Brothers, let each man, in whatever condition he was called, stay in that condition with God.

chokri: Pü ukofü kela kesü, I neko ce po süve, neko reni mute; dithito süo ketso sala ba? Nekori pü sajimi thita nyü bame?
english: He answered them, "I told you already, and you didn't listen. Why do you want to hear it again? You don't also want to become his disciples, do you?"

chokri: Uko süko se kesüce uko melü thizode püyo uko hu thezhe püyi.
english: Now when they heard these things, they were cut to the heart, and they gnashed at him with their teeth.

chokri: Pü kemelü chozucori sevota, pükhü kewhiko rüna metülü.
english: News about him went out into every place of the surrounding region.

chokri: Kekrelamori chozuco teshüko ba, thenyümiko, keregü kerezhümiko, kedokhrimiko, marhe kereshümiko, kecejü kemeda unüketsümiko ri sülü ba to.
english: Outside are the dogs, the sorcerers, the sexually immoral, the murderers, the idolaters, and everyone who loves and practices falsehood.

chokri: Jerusalem khü mhüko lü nadekolü makro tavorita, kethi miko züde, mu therü kesupo ukebü ketako sheri, uko mipüpü ti thi kesürho sü.
english: Multitudes also came together from the cities around Jerusalem, bringing sick people, and those who were tormented by unclean spirits: and they were all healed.

chokri: Thüma kühopührei pü sazüdzürami rütsüyoküzhomi mi küdokhrimi zo; mu küchothe kürhü lü mi küdokhrimi lü bayo moüküti neko rei se bayo.
english: Whoever hates his brother is a murderer, and you know that no murderer has eternal life remaining in him.

chokri: Kekrelamori jükho dipüce khapü meta sheri jükho sülü po kesüo sa moze kesuri ba.
english: For where a last will and testament is, there must of necessity be the death of him who made it.

chokri: Süla nkeve pomeshü mo ketola.
english: Then don't let your good be slandered,

chokri: Kekrelamori thüma hio Moses ceri zapozale thi züku zo ceo ce sheri cethi kesüo therho neku tibi.
english: For he has been counted worthy of more glory than Moses, inasmuch as he who built the house has more honor than the house.

chokri: Püzü revü keta thümako mhapüri poyisu bata, thefü-o se, vele mipüri ngomo.
english: The men who traveled with him stood speechless, hearing the sound, but seeing no one.

chokri: Saul kedokhri hio pü medo zole siziba. Pütü süce Jerusalem lü kehuko methi shuta, uko metü tapre Judea, Samaria, khü umhükolü vota; apostleko lebi zota.
english: Saul was consenting to his death. A great persecution arose against the assembly which was in Jerusalem in that day. They were all scattered abroad throughout the regions of Judea and Samaria, except for the apostles.

chokri: Kekrelamori thezho kedira kephoma kethiko thezho kedira shütazoto; thezholü phoma ketako thezholü uko neketi zo ketola.
english: For as many as have sinned without law will also perish without the law. As many as have sinned under the law will be judged by the law.

chokri: Pü tavo Assos lü hako zü kesüyi, püzüpü ru lü süyi de ta Mitylene lü vo.
english: When he met us at Assos, we took him aboard, and came to Mitylene.

chokri: Ile, uko Jihova zhopo kethi kemedami ta zoto Jihova Khrista merhü sala sü mozo sheri uko Khrista merhü sala süte ziti zhopo thita ketala, sübi kesamiko rhülayi mote.
english: Yes, we are found false witnesses of God, because we testified about God that he raised up Christ, whom he didn't raise up, if it is so that the dead are not raised.

chokri: Thüma hikohi nieko kükhrü tühü küthicie nieko zü hikücülü kürhodapü küta kropüh tüku kükhüko mpie modie u tho u va phuti-o kücükro, tükhra po hüshüküta kümhüko dzüshie ta kümo, tüsicie sü püshie küdi küsa sai sa kücü pü mieko chieluzo küva sübo kropüh.
english: These are hidden rocky reefs in your love feasts when they feast with you, shepherds who without fear feed themselves; clouds without water, carried along by winds; autumn leaves without fruit, twice dead, plucked up by the roots;

chokri: Sülize thünomi püh tse küriküna thüza krüh die kümüzheri ta küta püh daru küsemi kükrori po pu pe die.
english: A certain woman, who had an issue of blood for twelve years,

chokri: Neko dipü ti mu krato sheri süko lü hite, süko la nelü kemezhe de kehokero thi hite.
english: Don't seek what you will eat or what you will drink; neither be anxious.

chokri: Dei a kükhrüko nieko Nyepo Jisu Khrista Apostelko thadzü po küshü dzüko rükrashüte.
english: But you, beloved, remember the words which have been spoken before by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, hice kütha humi Thümanuo Pu küdelü küvori ngo kümothe küsa ngo Ihozo küti kropüh tha zo; zita.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, there are some standing here who will in no way taste of death, until they see the Son of Man coming in his Kingdom."

chokri: Side künani po u Jihova zühde cross yolü thümo püh thiyi kütona küngokümuo müsave.
english: and might reconcile them both in one body to God through the cross, having killed the hostility thereby.

chokri: Khrista yo ketako uthi upho mu mhamenyü ketako khipü Cross yo guve.
english: Those who belong to Christ have crucified the flesh with its passions and lusts.

chokri: Jisu mu pü sajiko ri cüpü nolü lü sü.
english: Jesus also was invited, with his disciples, to the marriage.

chokri: Philip no Nathanael ngoyi, de püce poti, Hako püngo yite Moses thezho lesilü mu saju kepoko thopü kemeta Jisu Nazareth mi, Joseph nu.
english: Philip found Nathanael, and said to him, "We have found him, of whom Moses in the law, and the prophets, wrote: Jesus of Nazareth, the son of Joseph."

chokri: Sü püh mi mhalü kühopühri u thi kürükrü sü Jihova mhashe mütüyo küzhoko nüda, sino ulüdoko tüpüvo Khrista dzüzü lü süyo.
english: throwing down imaginations and every high thing that is exalted against the knowledge of God, and bringing every thought into captivity to the obedience of Christ;

chokri: Mu pu pu bola khava die, sü die ta Jisu ce vorita.
english: He, casting away his cloak, sprang up, and came to Jesus.

chokri: U kereshüba püba, miz yo yitho thi kesü thethilü mha keti mezi püri di.
english: We have an altar from which those who serve the holy tabernacle have no right to eat.

chokri: Pü Judahmiko lebi la zome? Judahmi kemoko lari zo mome? Ile, Israelmi kemoko larizo.
english: Or is God the God of Jews only? Isn't he the God of Gentiles also? Yes, of Gentiles also,

chokri: Hi tüce cukevonye khrekhasü kemo tsükhri nye meno bata.
english: Now the feast of unleavened bread, which is called the Passover, drew near.

chokri: Pü kepo hio pü düpü sü thito sheri süo poba.
english: But he said this, signifying by what kind of death he should die.

chokri: Vele I nekopo thikenyü apo meze la nekoce vori keto thisü te.
english: I strongly urge you to do this, that I may be restored to you sooner.

chokri: Nadeo kezapü zasüh thiva, kede nadeko retuta; Babylon kezhosü Jihova mhüjü rükra la vori, pü lekhu kerü hezo pü pütsü ketola.
english: The great city was divided into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell. Babylon the great was remembered in the sight of God, to give to her the cup of the wine of the fierceness of his wrath.

chokri: Pü ace pode, sajü posalato thüma kekro mhüjü, shuyeko mhüjülü, ujü kekre ketsüko mhüjülü mu kedemiko mhüjülü.
english: They told me, "You must prophesy again over many peoples, nations, languages, and kings."

chokri: Neko athümakomo, sizi keta sülü, neko rhüketa Jihova mako sizide potato.
english: "It will be that in the place where it was said to them, 'You are not my people,' There they will be called 'children of the living God.'"

chokri: Tüyochoyimi dao thecü fü süri nace zasü zapü vüsü, khri zasü zapüri sa, mu thenyü zasü zapü; süko meü zasü zapü zübü ta, tüso zasü zapü va mota, mu tüzü ri sübi.
english: The fourth angel sounded, and one third of the sun was struck, and one third of the moon, and one third of the stars; so that one third of them would be darkened, and the day wouldn't shine for one third of it, and the night in the same way.

chokri: Khrista Jisu, rükra ba zo yi; I dzüyi küveo lü popüh mi müka küta kümha Pü küsako dolü rhüla süte, mu Pü David ye-o zo;
english: Remember Jesus Christ, risen from the dead, of the seed of David, according to my Gospel,

chokri: Süsa müthaküyiko vori uco kütso die; No dipühna kükremice züve poyo la? zita.
english: The disciples came, and said to him, "Why do you speak to them in parables?"

chokri: Thenopü poti, Niepoo mipüri mote. Jisu püce pode, I sheri nmejo ho, tavo tate, mu kephoma thi sahite.
english: She said, "No one, Lord." Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go your way. From now on, sin no more."

chokri: I Khrista Jüyikeve la menga ta yomo, kekrelamori süosü Jihova keku pü kelakeyi jü melü ketako metü tsüsü; Judahmiko ra süsa Greekmila sheri.
english: For I am not ashamed of the Gospel of Christ, for it is the power of God for salvation for everyone who believes; for the Jew first, and also for the Greek.

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova kebükerüti kekuomo, vele kezü keve, kemesamiko kehuce metülü.
english: for God is not a God of confusion, but of peace. As in all the assemblies of the saints,

chokri: Eli Jisu po la die sü, No sho küzüo se die sho ba mozo, Nenyie I kra too küba heo krayi ve me? Mori I baptaiz thipü kübao lü nenyi ri baptaiz thiyi ve me? zita. Punyi sü, hanyi sü thiyi ve zo, zita.
english: But Jesus answered, "You don't know what you are asking. Are you able to drink the cup that I am about to drink, and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with?" They said to him, "We are able."

chokri: Süri n zü ‘I’ zilize ‘I’ ziyi mo ‘MO’ zilize ‘MO’ ziyi; modie sü zü ta lize süko küsüo celü pari tazo.
english: But let your 'Yes' be 'Yes' and your 'No' be 'no.' Whatever is more than these is of the evil one.

chokri: Hizi tho meta, Hihe, I Zionlü ketsüpü shümeta, süolü miko phe meshü tato, minümo kethi tsü; somi pü melüyi mo sheri thenga thi taho.
english: even as it is written, "Behold, I lay in Zion a stumbling stone and a rock of offense; And no one who believes in him will be disappointed."

chokri: Kükrenamoli, Pu lüsiküseko bi mo die Pu kuku ne shüh die puko mütha küta na.
english: for he taught them with authority, and not like the scribes.

chokri: Khubüse tsadapü hezo kethi bi nade khü co uko tsada va, siri hezo kethobü thüza krü parita, gura ta kepha ketso thü khorita, furlong nyepü de krashurü ketso thüvata (1600).
english: The winepress was trodden outside of the city, and blood came out from the winepress, even to the bridles of the horses, as far as one thousand six hundred stadia.

chokri: Süsa Jisu pu rüthi die; Apo n yo dipüh thi küsü n nü ta? Zisü. Mu mhüceoe Puce, kümüthao, apo a mhü mhangoyi zhe! Zita.
english: Jesus asked him, "What do you want me to do for you?" The blind man said to him, "Rhabboni, that I may see again."

chokri: Levimipü ta sülüvo, püngosü thethi sülü cho kekrepülü ta vota,
english: In the same way a Levite also, when he came to the place, and saw him, passed by on the other side.

chokri: Mha hiko thi kevasa pü tavozü ri thümapü Levi letipü khazhonu khrü bade ngoyi, püce poti, “no asameji yite”
english: After these things he went out, and saw a tax collector named Levi sitting at the tax office, and said to him, "Follow me!"

chokri: Kekrelamori Niepoo vori keto keregomi tüzülü vori ketobi neko semeve shuba.
english: For you yourselves know well that the day of the Lord comes like a thief in the night.

chokri: Mha metükolü hepü tayo, mha metü melüyo, mha metü lüpü kemeri bayo, metülü sügü sühe yiyo.
english: bears all things, believes all things, hopes all things, endures all things.

chokri: No zapozale khapü atsü kesüko, I khapü uko tsü süte, sizide ukopo avu pü kethibi uko pori pü thiyi ketola.
english: The glory which you have given me, I have given to them; that they may be one, even as we are one;

chokri: Süsa Pu sülüno ta pra die tasü puko sinagog celü lü;
english: He departed there, and went into their synagogue.

chokri: I nojü khapü neko vathisü, themu khapü neko va thisümo, kekrelamori neko dolü tsüdo süko khiyiho, mori thiri yiho tila.
english: I fed you with milk, not with meat; for you weren't yet ready. Indeed, not even now are you ready,

chokri: Uko Jihova khapü uko kelü thinyümo ketala Jihova uko khapü kerevolü süve, thizükemoko thite.
english: Even as they refused to have God in their knowledge, God gave them up to a reprobate mind, to do those things which are not fitting;

chokri: Pü Jisu sü sopüdipü sheri pesü toli ba, püpeyi mota kekrelamori thüma kebü phi ketala, kekrelamori püda renu ketala.
english: He was trying to see who Jesus was, and couldn't because of the crowd, because he was short.

chokri: Pü acepoti, Rede tapra tate, kekrelamori I nketsüpü thethi kemecura Gentiles koce sü ketola.
english: "He said to me, 'Depart, for I will send you out far from here to the Gentiles.'"

chokri: Thüma kühopührei pü lülü bayo leküzhomi sümi rei Khrista kümha tüi zü.
english: he who says he remains in him ought himself also to walk just like he walked.

chokri: Thejo kepü kemeri Therü kezhoo, u kelakeyi Jisu Khrista zapozazle thi lavori ketoce.
english: looking for the blessed hope and appearing of the glory of our great God and Savior, Jesus Christ;

chokri: Vele pü kemetha mu püpi kekhati püpo keda metayo.
english: but is under guardians and stewards until the day appointed by the father.

chokri: Hiohi vasüo Jisu püpü methakeyiko mengo kesü, pü sa keva salü rhüla sü ketasa.
english: This is now the third time that Jesus was revealed to his disciples, after he had risen from the dead.

chokri: I mhatho hiko thitso kevasa, mhapü ketakokhi uko tsü kevasalü; I ta Spain lü kevo cholü neko züde kesüto.
english: When therefore I have accomplished this, and have sealed to them this fruit, I will go on by way of you to Spain.

chokri: Süsa Jisu thüma krode püh Pu hupü küba ngo küsüce, puko potasü lishico ku tano die Pu zü khasü.
english: Now when Jesus saw great multitudes around him, he gave the order to depart to the other side.

chokri: Kede kekrepü Joseph sekemopü sürita.
english: until there arose a different king, who didn't know Joseph.

chokri: Sidie po küti, I nekoce potü süto, neko lü küdepüh natsimine hihi biyi kümosa, neko tüyo küdelü lüyi lhozo, zita.
english: and said, "Most assuredly I tell you, unless you turn, and become as little children, you will in no way enter into the Kingdom of Heaven.

chokri: Tü mu cejü di tato vele ajüko di ta hozo.
english: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will by no means pass away.

chokri: Neko dolü sheri thüma hu sajiko shüpü mezikemo lü vota keto süri zoto.
english: Men will arise from among your own selves, speaking perverse things, to draw away the disciples after them.

chokri: N mhathoko I se, no mekorimo lürimo; no meko ta mori lüri ta ze a nü to ri.
english: "I know your works, that you are neither cold nor hot. I wish you were cold or hot.

chokri: Vele hako zono kecholü mu zhopolü hatü khasü bazoto.
english: But we will continue steadfastly in prayer and in the ministry of the word."

chokri: Tavote, I neko ketsü süzüho, teko ketsü pü sace dolü kesübi.
english: Go your ways. Behold, I send you out as lambs among wolves.

chokri: Kümüsako mütü nie külü süho.
english: All the saints greet you.

chokri: Ne sührhoyi küto la ne küjokümoko hunehu ce phravavate, mu huhu la choyiyite, kümathomi kücho kuphi mu u kücho ngoyiyo.
english: Confess your offenses to one another, and pray one for another, that you may be healed. The effective, earnest prayer of a righteous man is powerfully effective.

chokri: Süla neko menu yite, ukroko ce sheri, Kemesa Rüpü neko thipü mikefümi thisü tila, Jihova kehu va thino pütho püzapü neko khri yite.
english: Take heed, therefore, to yourselves, and to all the flock, in which the Holy Spirit has made you overseers, to shepherd the assembly of the Lord and God which he purchased with his own blood.

chokri: Tsüdo külhü ce mipo u müthimünyi küti zo kümosa u cekro mu u sazühzürako mu u lipüneko mu puzuneko mu u nuneko mu u cejüko dü thükra ngoyi külho ba mo; sü libizomori vori küto külhü lü küshothe kürhühri ngo yito.
english: but he will receive one hundred times more now in this time, houses, brothers, sisters, mothers, children, and land, with persecutions; and in the age to come eternal life.

chokri: Pü füphra meto de, “npheyo tosütha süte.” Siri pü rehü süthayi de chota yita.
english: said with a loud voice, "Stand upright on your feet!" He leaped up and walked.

chokri: Münu züh küba Jewmi küde-o sü dice ba? Kükrenamori, ha nathoco Pu thünyio ngo die pu rüsu to vori küzüna zidie kütsota.
english: "Where is he who is born King of the Jews? For we saw his star in the east, and have come to worship him."

chokri: Vele tsüo, hico ala mhatho baphi mote, I hijü tütse kekro menyü ketabi nekoce vori nyü bate.
english: but now, no longer having any place in these regions, and having these many years a longing to come to you,

chokri: Pu mi züh kümürha mori küphüse ri tayi Iho, mori shopü sholiko lü ri mipo Pu khü selho.
english: He will not strive, nor shout; Neither will anyone hear his voice in the streets.

chokri: Pü poti, I nza halapü a sazüjürako ce süto, I kehuce metsulü n kechu tsale thisü to.
english: saying, "I will declare your name to my brothers. In the midst of the congregation I will sing your praise."

chokri: Kühopü biri nieko a müzhie küzaküyi la nieko müzari zoho.
english: However you did well that you shared in my affliction.

chokri: Damacus lü küzhoo Aretas küdeo khro kübao atüyi tono Damascus nadeo khüba,
english: In Damascus the governor under Aretas the king guarded the city of the Damascenes desiring to arrest me.

chokri: Pü Sergius Paulus khro kezho mipü, mhakese mipü, pü Barnabas mu Saul ni cüsü de unice Jihova jü reni nyüde.
english: who was with the proconsul, Sergius Paulus, a man of understanding. This man summoned Barnabas and Saul, and sought to hear the word of God.

chokri: Püfü kelakesü, I nce kethopo süto, tha no azü kereyi balü (tülü) lü tato.
english: Jesus said to him, "Assuredly I tell you, today you will be with me in Paradise."

chokri: Room dipo lu zu?
english: In which room did you sleep?

chokri: Kekrelamori Poo mipüri mejo yomo, vele sheco metü khapü Nuo melü süte.
english: For the Father judges no one, but he has given all judgment to the Son,

chokri: Süsa püpoti. Apo no pü ketsüpü apocelü süte.
english: "He said, 'I ask you therefore, father, that you would send him to my father's house;

chokri: U külaküyi u Kümünupüh mhüzü ce no siküti pu nüzo kütila.
english: For this is good and acceptable in the sight of God our Savior;

chokri: I nekoce potüsüto, tsüdo kehüko di taho mha süko thitso kemothe.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, this generation will not pass away until all things are accomplished.

chokri: Poti, hako kebü hite, no hakozü kedipü thita, no Nazareth mi Jisu? No hako meka ketola vorime? I nseba no sopüsheri, Therü kemesao.
english: saying, "Ah! what have we to do with you, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know you who you are: the Holy One of God!"

chokri: Eli, I puce po die, I neko se mo ho, neko mha küsü küthiko neko ta a thürütate zita to.
english: Then I will tell them, 'I never knew you. Depart from me, you who work iniquity.'

chokri: Mu Magdalin Mary mu Joseph ne zu Mary unyi Pu püh kükhrüh thi ngo.
english: Mary Magdalene and Mary, the mother of Joses, saw where he was laid.

chokri: Kemelülü uko jükezho kemereo lü tavota, cejü kesolü keta thide, Egypt thümako sülü uko mehü khriva.
english: By faith, they passed through the Red sea as on dry land. When the Egyptians tried to do so, they were swallowed up.

chokri: Pü ukoce jüvepü posü, pütü metülü kecho thiba moze kesu, mu ho mezata kemo.
english: He also spoke a parable to them that they must always pray, and not give up,

chokri: Neko hasa mejite, mu Niepoo sajimi thite, kemezhe tilü jüo khiyi, Kemesa Rüpü kenelü.
english: You became imitators of us, and of the Lord, having received the word in much affliction, with joy of the Holy Spirit,

chokri: I nekoyo athepu bate, azüko, nekoyo keve nephi bate, ngokeyimhaseri seshu bate, hunehu tahi tarhoyi rivebate.
english: I myself am also persuaded about you, my brothers, that you yourselves are full of goodness, filled with all knowledge, able also to admonish others.

chokri: Pü tüsozho rho kebao Niepoo la rhoba, sübi tüsozho rho kemoo Niepoo la tüsozho rhomo ba. Ketio Niepoola tiba, tikemo-o Niepoo la timoba; Jihova kemeza pote.
english: He who observes the day, observes it to the Lord; and he who does not observe the day, to the Lord he does not observe it. He who eats, eats to the Lord, for he gives God thanks. He who doesn't eat, to the Lord he doesn't eat, and gives God thanks.

chokri: Kekrelamori nbepü thisü toli süculü lü mu rhüpü ketako.
english: to do whatever your hand and your council foreordained to happen.

chokri: Sidie nelüno hari Abraham sü hapo zo; süzi küti lüta hite, I neko ce po süto, Jihova-e kütsü hiko yori Abraham nuneko mülhü süyi vezo.
english: Don't think to yourselves, 'We have Abraham for our father,' for I tell you that God is able to raise up children to Abraham from these stones.

chokri: Süsa küshüo lize, tü sü tato, kükrenamoli, tü müre mo kümhü sü zaza ba terü, ziyo.
english: In the morning, 'It will be foul weather today, for the sky is red and threatening.' Hypocrites! You know how to discern the appearance of the sky, but you can't discern the signs of the times!

chokri: No Khristao, sopühno n vü sheli tha sadzühküse zü hace po süte, zita.
english: saying, "Prophesy to us, you Christ! Who hit you?"

chokri: Tsühi I Mecedonia chozü tavori to, mu sülü ta neko ce vori to.
english: But I will come to you when I have passed through Macedonia, for I am passing through Macedonia.

chokri: Sidie puko Pu ngo küyice prü Pu rüsa ta, eli humi külüdo ta.
english: When they saw him, they bowed down to him, but some doubted.

chokri: Kethozo, hako neko zü batice, thajü vo ketako bi mipo uko methimeni zo metse, nekori seba.
english: For most assuredly, when we were with you, we told you beforehand that we are to suffer affliction, even as it happened, and you know.

chokri: Mhace nmo metü vekrü ba lize, püceri zü ta moze, meto keve mhava vekrü keba bi.
english: If therefore your whole body is full of light, having no part dark, it will be wholly full of light, as when the lamp with its bright shining gives you light."

chokri: Neko cü keyio jüthozo, pü thisü zoto.
english: Faithful is he who calls you, who will also do it.

chokri: Vele süko kethi mhüjü uko be khapü neko yo sü to; neko methito, neko zü kereshücekolü voto, thejücekolü, kedeko mu kezhomiko mhüjülü voto; azalan.
english: But before all these things, they will lay their hands on you and will persecute you, delivering you up to synagogues and prisons, bringing you before kings and governors for my name's sake.

chokri: Sücesü Jerusalem, Judea, cejü mütü mo Jordan kümütu rüna mütü lüno mi puce vori.
english: Then people from Jerusalem, all of Judea, and all the region around the Jordan went out to him.

chokri: Kebu keti la ketasa, Paul kemelü miko cüpü puce süyi, uko mebosü de ta Macedonai lü vo ketola ukozü kekho ta.
english: After the uproar had ceased, Paul sent for the disciples, took leave of them, and departed to go into Macedonia.

chokri: Abraham kemelü dojü kepelü Isaac pü reshü thi, mu pünu pupo khi reshü thi, mu pünu puleo khi reshü kethila Jüphra kesüo kalü ngoyi.
english: By faith, Abraham, being tested, offered up Isaac. Yes, he who had gladly received the promises was offering up his one and only son;

chokri: Ne kümathomi müjo de dokhrivate, sükoe ne müsüh thiyo mo.
english: You have condemned, you have murdered the righteous one. He doesn't resist you.

chokri: Jisu süo sekeyice poti, kethi hio sata ketola mo, vele Niepoo zapo zale kethila, Jihova Nu zapozale thiyi ketola.
english: But when Jesus heard it, he said, "This sickness is not to death, but for the glory of God, that God's Son may be glorified by it."

chokri: Süsa Jisu pu yisü; natsimiko po mügu mürate, kükrelamori natsimi lüva khiyi die kügü püh tüshiko mhuzülü sü küti vemo tila, zita.
english: But Jesus said to her, "Let the children be filled first, for it is not appropriate to take the children's bread and throw it to the dogs."

chokri: Süzi die nekoe neko tho neko yisü sadzühküsemi küdokhrimi nuneko thi die poyo.
english: Therefore you testify to yourselves that you are children of those who killed the prophets.

chokri: Uko ta thevo kezhoo ce vo poti, hako reshu thipü bate Paul dokhri va kemothe hako mhapüri tiho.
english: They came to the chief priests and the elders, and said, "We have bound ourselves under a great curse, to taste nothing until we have killed Paul.

chokri: Sücesü Phariseeko Püce vori Pu müdephi die sü; mipüh-e mha kühopüh nari pü cemi kha küva thüzho me? zita.
english: Pharisees came to him, testing him, and saying, "Is it lawful for a man to divorce his wife for any reason?"

chokri: Kükrelamori, John-e Herod yisü; No n sazüh-o cemi yiti thüzho mo zi küta la.
english: For John said to Herod, "It is not lawful for you to have your brother's wife."

chokri: Kükrenamoli thüma kühopühri mha püce kübao kha pü prü sasü to; mo pü ne küthi sayi to, süri thüma kühopühri mha püce ba kümoo kha pü prü sa küsüo mori püce kübao ri khi süh tato.
english: For whoever has, to him will be given, and he will have abundance, but whoever doesn't have, from him will be taken away even that which he has.

chokri: Kücezü sadzühküseko yo neko münuyi te, süko tüko khüne süh die neko ce vori yo; eli puko lü lükhrono tüküti saceko zo.
english: "Beware of false prophets, who come to you in sheep's clothing, but inwardly are ravening wolves.

chokri: John pü sajimi kena ketsüpü Jisu cesüde pü ketso, no vori ketoo me? Mano hakopo kekrepü fü bata?
english: John, calling to himself two of his disciples, sent them to Jesus, saying, "Are you the one who is coming, or should we look for another?"

chokri: Kehu lata kezüce Jews miko mu Judahmi kemoko nani zü ketako Paul mu Barnabas ni sameju ta; side uni ukopo Jihova ngokemezhelü tha metüyi no uko tarho sü.
english: Now when the synagogue broke up, many of the Jews and of the devout proselytes followed Paul and Barnabas; who, speaking to them, urged them to continue in the grace of God.

chokri: Tsoo Jisu Jihova Nuo zoküti mülüküzhoo sa cejüo ce kuyiyo küzhomi somi ra?
english: Who is he who overcomes the world, but he who believes that Jesus is the Son of God?

chokri: Kükrelamori, thüma lüno küprari kosü, lüdoküsu, kükhrüküzüh küti, kürüzü.
english: For from within, out of the hearts of men, proceed evil thoughts, adulteries, sexual sins, murders, thefts,

chokri: Vele sizosheri Silas sülü basa nyü de bata. (Version hulü hio bamo)
english: Notwithstanding it pleased Silas to abide there still.

chokri: Vele thüma hio kechothe tasü tazo, thevo mhatho redereleyo kemola.
english: But he, because he lives forever, has his priesthood unchangeable.

chokri: Süla Jihova mhase po kesü, I saju kepo mu Apostleko ketsü süto, süko humi ukopo dokhri to mu methi meni to.
english: Therefore also the wisdom of God said, 'I will send to them prophets and apostles; and some of them they will kill and persecute,

chokri: Hizi thopü meta, “Kematho kemezi püri dide, mipüri ta mote.”
english: As it is written, "There is no one righteous. No, not one.

chokri: Süze thüma kühopühri shoyo kütimi ngoyi yo, mo phuyo kütimi ngoyi yo; cekha küdüyo kütimi ri mi khrisü sümi prüyo.
english: For everyone who asks receives. He who seeks finds. To him who knocks it will be opened.

chokri: Mhace humi neni ketsode dipüla pü phrü bata? Neni püce po süte, kekrelamori Niepoo (püzü) khimoze su bale.
english: If anyone asks you, 'Why are you untying it?' say to him: 'The Lord needs it.'"

chokri: Shote, süze khapüh ne prüto, phute, süze ne ngoyito; cekha küdü züzo te, süze khrisü ne prüto.
english: "Ask, and it will be given you. Seek, and you will find. Knock, and it will be opened for you.

chokri: Sidie puko süce ba die Pu khü bata.
english: and they sat and watched him there.

chokri: Kükhrüko, u lü-e u müjoyo molizo, u Jihovamhodzü lü u küthüpu nebate.
english: Beloved, if our hearts don't condemn us, we have boldness toward God;

chokri: Mu Jisu metsulü thade jükho kesao thi kesüo, mu püza kegü kesüo, Abel ceri mha veku ti pokesüo.
english: to Jesus, the mediator of a new covenant, and to the blood of sprinkling that speaks better than that of Abel.

chokri: Jihova cejüo khrüthori zode pü Nu pule-o kha süzo, thüma kehopüri pü melü keyimi shütaho, vele kechothe kerhü ngo yito.
english: For God so loved the world, that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish, but have eternal life.

chokri: Mu apostleko belü zasi mu ungo mhatho thipü thümako dolü sü shuta, uko metü kezü pü thide Solomon cehükhro bazo.
english: By the hands of the apostles many signs and wonders were done among the people. They were all with one accord in Solomon's porch.

chokri: Niepoo cüyi ketamiko pü thekü mithi te Niepoo he kevami, cüyi ketako hesü ve, mu Khrista thekümi thite.
english: For he who was called in the Lord being a bondservant is the Lord's free man. Likewise he who was called being free is Christ's bondservant.

chokri: Süo therüo medozo tila, neko thi kemesa keyi, mu keregükerezhü lü ne kethü kerüyi.
english: For this is the will of God: your sanctification, that you abstain from sexual immorality,

chokri: Mori kerekrü sheri, mori kerelü sheri, mori khonu kehopü sheri, Jihova kekhrülü uthikho vaho, Jisu Khrista uko Niepoo lano.
english: nor height, nor depth, nor any other created thing, will be able to separate us from the love of God, which is in Christ Jesus our Lord.

chokri: Jihova cejü thisü, mu sülü ketako metü sheri, Pü türi mu cejüri Niepoo zo, pü ube khi kethi kereshü cekolü bayomo.
english: The God who made the world and all things in it, he, being Lord of heaven and earth, doesn't dwell in temples made with hands,

chokri: Tüso vori cu pü sajiko cüsü, mikerikena kedapü püsaji thiyi, mu süko thopü apostels zisü.
english: When it was day, he called his disciples, and from them he chose twelve, whom he also named apostles:

chokri: Sopü kezülü usüphra sü sheri, sülü kekuo belü, side uthi kedepü pü nu pükhrüo kedebalü kesü.
english: who delivered us out of the power of darkness, and translated us into the Kingdom of the Son of his love;

chokri: I Poo ce mhacho süto, mu pü thelü thokemelu khapü neko tsü süto, side pü neko zü kechothe ba tato.
english: I will pray to the Father, and he will give you another Counselor, that he may be with you forever,--

chokri: Süla I mhapüri kechodu mozode tavorizü, aketsü kesübi, süla neko kedipü kelüla acüsüa?
english: Therefore also I came without complaint when I was sent for. I ask therefore, why did you send for me?"

chokri: Kekrelamori pü theco thepe kemezio zo; thenotekhrüpü mejo süte, pü keregü kerezhüko pü cejüo merho süte, pü belü choyikethiko za khü po thisüte.
english: for true and righteous are his judgments. For he has judged the great prostitute, who corrupted the earth with her sexual immorality, and he has avenged the blood of his servants at her hand."

chokri: Sopüno akepoko kha püta mu züyi sheri pü akhrüta; pü akhrü ketao sü a Po sheri khrü tazo: I sheri pü khrüto, mu I akhapü pü mese mengo süto.
english: One who has my commandments, and keeps them, that person is one who loves me. One who loves me will be loved by my Father, and I will love him, and will reveal myself to him."

chokri: Pü uko cho keba thümao khapü uko tsüsü, mi kedokhri mu mhakebü ketao, thejücelü tüpü kemetao, mu Jisu khapü uko menyü kebabi pü uko belü süva.
english: He released him who had been thrown into prison for insurrection and murder, for whom they asked, but he delivered Jesus up to their will.

chokri: Sülize pu linen khü khriyi mu Pu mo püh kiri die linen khüo püh küzüyi die Pu püh vo tsüpüh ho küma mhakhrelü va. Sidie kütsü phu küla püh mhakhre ta müka va.
english: He bought a linen cloth, and taking him down, wound him in the linen cloth, and laid him in a tomb which had been cut out of a rock. He rolled a stone against the door of the tomb.

chokri: Mu uko zecholü sa tato, mu uko tüzü shuye metülü thejü thivo tato, mu Gentilemiko Jerusalem kedüda vato, Jewmi kemoko pütü tsota kemothe.
english: They will fall by the edge of the sword, and will be led captive into all the nations. Jerusalem will be trampled down by the Gentiles, until the times of the Gentiles are fulfilled.

chokri: Sücesü tüyo mhakhü püh vori die po küti; No sü a nu a khrüthoo, I n ngo a künüthoo zo, zisü.
english: A voice came out of the sky, "You are my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased."

chokri: Uko dolü sopü kezhotho thito sheri kebuta.
english: There arose also a contention among them, which of them was considered to be greatest.

chokri: Pü sajiko cepoti, süla I neko ce posüto, nekehü la mhapüri medo thahite, no dipü tita, mori n mola dipü khi be meneta ziti.
english: He said to his disciples, "Therefore I tell you, don't be anxious for your life, what you will eat, nor yet for your body, what you will wear.

chokri: Pü mohor kevü kenao phrü sü, siri khonu kenao poti, “vori pete” sitsü I se.
english: When he opened the second seal, I heard the second living creature saying, "Come!"

chokri: Nlü kemezhe tasu, neko Jihova melü bayi, mu amelüri bayite.
english: "Don't let your heart be troubled. Believe in God. Believe also in me.

chokri: Süri neko Pu küde küthi mo Pu kümatho phu mürayite, sülize mha hikohi mütü püh neko sa süto.
english: But seek first God's Kingdom, and his righteousness; and all these things will be given to you as well.

chokri: Kehulü thüma makro püzü Pilate-e ce vori.
english: The whole company of them rose up and brought him before Pilate.

chokri: Asazüjürako, I neko ce choyo, “abiyite” kekrelamori I sheri neko bizo tila, neko areza sümo
english: I beg you, brothers, become as I am, for I also have become as you are. You did me no wrong,

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, amelü keyimi amhatho kethiko pü sheri thiyi to, mu mhatho süko ceri zhokuti thi yito; kekrelamori I a Po celü vota tokezüla.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, he who believes in me, the works that I do, he will do also; and greater works than these will he do; because I am going to my Father.

chokri: Kekrelamori cejü hilü mhase Jihova la kenyo püzo. Kekrelamori hiziti thopü meta, Pü mhakeseko dokerü khi yite.
english: For the wisdom of this world is foolishness with God. For it is written, "He has taken the wise in their craftiness."

chokri: Süze no Kapernaun, n tho nthi kürükrü püh tü tso bate me? N khipüh prü mezalü sü vato. Kükrena moli, n celü mhatho küzho thi küsüko hi Sodomlü ri thi sü lize Sodom-e tha kütso ri balu to murü.
english: You, Capernaum, who are exalted to Heaven, you will go down to Hades. For if the mighty works had been done in Sodom which were done in you, it would have remained until this day.

chokri: Mu müthaküyiko Pu yisü, thüma kroko n whü pü küta ngo zori, No sopühn anyi sü la zi tome? Zita.
english: His disciples said to him, "You see the multitude pressing against you, and you say, 'Who touched me?'"

chokri: Süna püe pode; züh kübako coyiküsa lü to süyi mu Khristae püküvekhapüh nüko prüto.
english: Therefore he says, "Awake, you who sleep, and arise from the dead, and Christ will shine on you."

chokri: Tü mo cejü di tato, eli, azüko di ta lhozo.
english: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away.

chokri: Mhace tsüdo Khrista kesalü rhüla sü keta uzhopo thita lize, neko dolü dipü bide rhüsalakesü bamo siti pota yola?
english: Now if Christ is preached, that he has been raised from the dead, how do some among you say that there is no resurrection of the dead?

chokri: Sülize süko Puyo uko lü kükrita. Süsa Jisu süko yisü, sadzüküsemi püh putho pu rakhülü mu putho pu shühyiemi mu putho pu cekrolü zo kümosa thürho di mozo, zita.
english: Jesus said to them, "A prophet is not without honor, except in his own country, and among his own relatives, and in his own house."

chokri: Süze puko küde-o zü rünyiyi die ta zo vota, mo puko nathoco küngo thünyio puko mhuzü ra vo die unu-o khapüh kümüzü thüthi-o pitü lü bata.
english: They, having heard the king, went their way; and behold, the star, which they saw in the east, went before them, until it came and stood over where the young child was.

chokri: Tüko dita to, eli azüko mhapühceri di tayi lho.
english: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away.

chokri: Sülize, nekoe tüyo küba neko Poo nuneko thiyi küto na; Kükrenamoli Pün ace mütho püh küsümi rimo küvemi ri vasüyo, mo tü mürü püh küzüthomi ri kümomi ri prü süyo tina.
english: that you may be children of your Father who is in heaven. For he makes his sun to rise on the evil and the good, and sends rain on the just and the unjust.

chokri: Kehopüri ta ketsüyo tsü timi kesüphro vato, vele ketsü süo tatsü pü kesü tisa pü kesü phrephapha pü megünyo thitato.
english: "Everyone who falls on that stone will be broken to pieces, But it will crush whomever it falls on to dust."

chokri: Kekrelamori ut püpo theprü celü lü keta reyi ku, kene mipü po Jihova kedelü lüti ceri.
english: For it is easier for a camel to enter in through a needle's eye, than for a rich man to enter into the Kingdom of God."

chokri: Augustus kedeo celü thezhopü khakesü, cejü metü theza thosü node posü.
english: Now it happened in those days, that a decree went out from Caesar Augustus that all the world should be enrolled.

chokri: Hidzü pü thathi no mipo püpüh vüve, vele Jihova küku la rhüh tate. Hari thathi no püyo hü, vele nieko cie küvoce püzü no Jihova küku lü hü süto.
english: For he was crucified through weakness, yet he lives through the power of God. For we also are weak in him, but we will live with him through the power of God toward you.

chokri: Mi nekekhrüko lebi khrüyo lize, dipü kemeza ngoyita? Kephomako sheri siziti thiyo tila.
english: If you love those who love you, what credit is that to you? For even sinners love those who love them.

chokri: Niepoo Jisu Khrista Kekhrü po ne metüko zü vo keyi thi te. Amen.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with all the saints. Amen.

chokri: Vele I jükeve po keta hio thüma celü vorimo siti I zhopo thi neko cesü yo.
english: But I make known to you, brothers, concerning the Gospel which was preached by me, that it is not according to man.

chokri: Sidie pukoe; Jewmi küdeo, thi te; zi die Pu külu.
english: They began to salute him, "Hail, King of the Jews!"
