chokri: Vele I rekri vapülü nekoce vori tato, mhace Niepoo medo lize, uko kemeko jüpo keba füko seyito, vele keku kene jü.
english: But I will come to you shortly, if the Lord is willing. And I will know, not the word of those who are puffed up, but the power.

chokri: Süsa krapi kezhoo taphe pü menoyi, de püpüyi, thegi ro kenapü pü phayi no posü, pü sopü sheri ketso, mu pü dipü thiva sheri.
english: Then the commanding officer came near, arrested him, commanded him to be bound with two chains, and inquired who he was and what he had done.

chokri: Kekrelamori hiko mha kekro kebalü pü khasüba, Jihova mhangulü; vele theno hipü pü tsakhulü keba metü püvo khasüte.
english: for all these put in gifts for God from their abundance, but she, out of her poverty, put in all that she had to live on."

chokri: Kekrelamori cemu reta keto hio thipü cemu retayi keholü süva moze kesula, mu sata keto zhühio thipü sata keho zhü thisü moze kesula.
english: For this corruptible must put on incorruption, and this mortal must put on immortality.

chokri: Hako kephoma va hatsü süte, hari mi hakoyo kekri ketako vapü ketsübi. Hazü medokephilü lühite, siziti mole keshülü hakela yite.
english: Forgive us our sins, For we ourselves also forgive everyone who is indebted to us. Bring us not into temptation, But deliver us from the evil one.'"

chokri: Paul mu Silas ni ta Amphipolis mu Apolonica vathü Thessalonica lü vori, sülü Jews mi Synagogue ba.
english: Now when they had passed through Amphipolis and Apollonia, they came to Thessalonica, where there was a synagogue of the Jews.

chokri: Rahab thethüpü sheri kekreko züde kesa katamo, melükemoko zü, thenopü pünü saide pü rami ra kevoriko meso keyila.
english: By faith, Rahab the prostitute, didn't perish with those who were disobedient, having received the spies in peace.

chokri: Tütse kena vota, Felix vale Porcius Festus tavo rita, Jews miko nü thi ketola Felix Paul khapü thejü thi mezüta.
english: But when two years were fulfilled, Felix was succeeded by Porcius Festus, and desiring to gain favor with the Jews, Felix left Paul in bonds.

chokri: Cüsa niephie müsükütolü niepo thayi kütola mü niepo jota modie püh tho zalie thikütolü u nüthori küto na no.
english: Now to him who is able to keep them from stumbling, and to present you faultless before the presence of his glory in great joy,

chokri: Vele thethi pülü mipü zhopo kha zhopo süo, “thüma sü dipüle no pü rele lüzo ba? Mori thümanu no püpe zo taya?”
english: But one has somewhere testified, saying, "What is man, that you think of him? Or the son of man, that you care for him?

chokri: M pübe lü uzaco thenyü thüna ba; pü talü zecho lucohico uyi keve bi ta pa ta: pü pepü meshümedü nace pü pü rütso thi.
english: He had seven stars in his right hand. Out of his mouth proceeded a sharp two-edged sword. His face was like the sun shining at its brightest.

chokri: Thümao tata, de pü Jisu le ti pü mice posü, püthi kesürho kesüo.
english: The man went away, and told the Jews that it was Jesus who had made him well.

chokri: Süze pü lipüneko ri u züh bazo mo me? Sülize Pu dipühceno mha hiko ngoyi ta?
english: Aren't all of his sisters with us? Where then did this man get all of these things?"

chokri: Vele cheta süo pülü lüti a niepoo la vori mhai hote, mu pü choyi miko thepu thenoko vü bata mu keti kekra thi mezü bata.
english: But if that servant says in his heart, 'My lord delays his coming,' and begins to beat the menservants and the maidservants, and to eat and drink, and to be drunken,

chokri: Eli nekoe po küti; mhaceno mipühe pupo mori pu zu yisü; Korban te, süosü acelü nve küyi müsühko püh Poo prüve zi küsüce puyo mhapühri thi mota die pu khasü vayo.
english: But you say, 'If a man tells his father or his mother, "Whatever profit you might have received from me is Corban, that is to say, given to God;"'

chokri: Süsa Küde Pu zaco kübako yisü apo galiphi püh neko küprüko, neko voridie cejü thiyi prühlüno küsüh püh kümüta kedebao gwüyite;
english: Then the King will tell those on his right hand, 'Come, blessed of my Father, inherit the Kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the world;

chokri: Süsa pu ta pra die pu ceri süku küti rüpü thüna zühyi die sülü vori die lhü tayo; süsa thüma süo rüle künuco-e küraco ceri sü thünao tayo. Tsüdo kürüzü numi hiko yori sübi zoto, zita.
english: Then he goes, and takes with himself seven other spirits more evil than he is, and they enter in and dwell there. The last state of that man becomes worse than the first. Even so will it be also to this evil generation."

chokri: Si kütao mole “Nepoo müdo leo uko rhüba de mha hio mori luo thito,” neko süzi pote.
english: For you ought to say, "If the Lord wills, we will both live, and do this or that."

chokri: Thüma hio sühlü I kümüha to: vele utho uceco kümühayi ho, a thathio lüzo kümosa.
english: On behalf of such a one I will boast, but on my own behalf I will not boast, except in my weaknesses.

chokri: Uko kemekre bata. Süla Jisu püthi kesürho süde pü ketsü metava.
english: But they were silent. He took him, and healed him, and let him go.

chokri: U Kemenupü u Poo mu Niepo Jisu Khrista celü kepari ngokemezhe mu thelü kemenüo po nieko züh ba keyio thiyite.
english: Grace to you, and peace from God, our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Neko pi kekha kebako salam khatsüsü züho, mu kemesamiko metü tsü sasü ho. Italy lü kebako neko kelu süzüho.
english: Greet all of your leaders and all the saints. The Italians greet you.

chokri: Dei a kükhrüko nieko Kümüsa Ropüo lü choba die nieko kümülü kümüsa thoo zalü ve kühü ma ma zo yi te.
english: But you, beloved, keep building up yourselves on your most holy faith, praying in the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Müthaküyioe pu bi mo ceta-oe pu nyepoo bi küyi sasü tsüh zo, Mi celü nyepoo thori yisü Beelzebub litaze, pu celümiko yisü dithili-e cita?
english: It is enough for the disciple that he be like his teacher, and the servant like his lord. If they have called the master of the house Beelzebul, how much more those of his household!

chokri: Thüma melüko di tato mpe ketala, mha süko cejülü vori ketala, kekrelamori tülü kekuko kena süto.
english: men fainting for fear, and for expectation of the things which are coming on the world: for the powers of the heavens will be shaken.

chokri: Pu po die sü I prüyi lho; zita. Eli künuco pu lü küdeyi die prüta.
english: He answered, 'I will not,' but afterward he changed his mind, and went.

chokri: Uko pü ketso de püce poti, Mhace no Khrista mo lize dipüla jülo khapü mi tsüya, Elijah ri mo mu Isaiah rimo mori saju kepomi rimo lize?
english: They asked him, "Why then do you baptize, if you are not the Christ, nor Elijah, nor the Prophet?"

chokri: Jisu poti, I cho-ozo, kethoo mu kerhüo zo; mipüri Poo celü vo keyi bamo vele ayo lebi.
english: Jesus said to him, "I am the way, the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father, except through me.

chokri: Pü sopü lezide mhace no mhakeve meji ta lize uko n metsuyi veta?
english: Now who is he who will harm you, if you become imitators of that which is good?

chokri: No shebato, kümülü pü mhatho zü kübesüh de mhathi, mu mhatho yolü kümülü ve zhochüküyi zo
english: You see that faith worked with his works, and by works faith was perfected;

chokri: Pharisee mipü püza Nicodemus lesi de Jews miko kekha tayo.
english: Now there was a man of the Pharisees named Nicodemus, a ruler of the Jews.

chokri: Vele mhakha mitsü mi Za süte, no thi kebabi, hihe, nla mhametü mesazo.
english: But give for gifts to the needy those things which are within, and behold, all things will be clean to you.

chokri: Nüko yolü mha kükhuko lükhulüdami kürhekütsü dzüküsu küpo mu külhakütsüko kha vayi.
english: Let all bitterness, wrath, anger, outcry, and slander, be put away from you, with all malice.

chokri: Pü lesipü hibide thosü.
english: He wrote a letter like this:

chokri: Cukevo nye mhüjüce Jisu cejülü tata keto pütü tsoba keta seba tila cejülü pümako khrü zovo thela tsozo.
english: Now before the feast of the Passover, Jesus knowing that his time had come that he would depart from this world to the Father, having loved his own who were in the world, he loved them to the end.

chokri: Jisu pücepoti, mhango yite, n kemelü n kelasü teho.
english: Jesus said to him, "Receive your sight. Your faith has healed you."

chokri: Vele thüma jüo reni keyiko melüyita, piphi thüma süko nye püngu.
english: But many of those who heard the word believed, and the number of the men came to be about five thousand.

chokri: Uko kelüce neko uko zü kemekro mo ketala neko lüpü uhü kekre kropü thite mu mhakesu popü neko tha, mu neko keyeri keta bi potate.
english: They think it is strange that you don't run with them into the same excess of riot, blaspheming:

chokri: Künemiko cedzü hihi posüte; uko pon ncene phude kümoko hi mori ukümüri mütüpüh u cenelü sü hite, kükrelamoh süsü küchothe ba küto cene moeli uko pon ukümüri püh Kümünupüh yolü süyite. Kükrelamoli putho cene sü molize kesu mütü püh u kütsüla.
english: Charge those who are rich in this present world that they not be haughty, nor have their hope set on the uncertainty of riches, but on the living God, who richly provides us with everything to enjoy;

chokri: Hilü, Mary Magdalene, Joana, Mary James zü, mu theno kekreko ri ta, kha apostleko koce posü.
english: Now they were Mary Magdalene, Joanna, and Mary the mother of James. The other women with them told these things to the apostles.

chokri: Süsari Dikon thi münu küzhomi u kümülü ri neyi de Jisu Khrista cecho nkümülü thüpu küthi mamayi yo.
english: For those who have served well as deacons gain to themselves a good standing, and great boldness in the faith which is in Christ Jesus.

chokri: Jülopükeyikhü u Jisu Khrista kesalü jülopüyi tati neko semo zome?
english: Or don't you know that all we who were baptized into Christ Jesus were baptized into his death?

chokri: Eli thümako rüdü küta sa Pu celü lü die süpü be cesü, mo süpü süri ta.
english: But when the crowd was put out, he entered in, took her by the hand, and the girl arose.

chokri: Kesemi le sizi tayo, vele uko kenyomi thite.
english: Professing themselves to be wise, they became fools,

chokri: Jisu Puko zü kül; a die; no ce künye hiko ngo bame? Kütsü phu kütu va mo die pühri po küpiba pü bayi lho, zita.
english: Jesus said to him, "Do you see these great buildings? There will not be left here one stone on another, which will not be thrown down."

chokri: Jisu pükoce po die sü, I nekoce po süto, Thümanuo Pu küde zapozale küthi balü ba die mha thi küsala küti tüce, neko ri küdeba kürikünalü ba die Israelmi shühye kürikünako ne küti to, zita.
english: Jesus said to them, "Most assuredly I tell you that you who have followed me, in the regeneration when the Son of Man will sit on the throne of his glory, you also will sit on twelve thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.

chokri: Pü uko kemelü ngo kesüce “Thümao, n kephomako vasüteho,” ze posü.
english: Seeing their faith, he said to him, "Man, your sins are forgiven you."

chokri: Süsa Jisu rürüh lico hico pe die, pu müthaküyiko yisü, Mhakünemikoe Poo küdelü lüyi küto la didüpüh rüh to shehe, zita.
english: Jesus looked around, and said to his disciples, "How difficult it is for those who have riches to enter into the Kingdom of God!"

chokri: Tsühi uko seyi keta no khapü aketsüko nzhü zoleti seyite.
english: Now they have known that all things whatever you have given me are from you,
